successful and inviolable king.
If Jupiter aspects the Moon in Gemini, one will be a teacher of Shastras, be famous, truthful, very
beautiful, honourable and be an eloquent speaker.
If Venus aspects the Moon in Gemini, the person will be endowed with the company of supreme
females, garlands, robes, conveyances, ornaments and jewels and will be sportive.
Should Saturn aspect the Moon in Gemini, the subject will be devoid of relatives, wife, happiness
and wealth and will be inimical to the public.
23. If the Moon is in Cancer at birth, the native will be fortunate, valorous, be endowed with
residence, friends, journeys and astrological knowledge, be sensuous, grateful, be a minister,
be truthful, will live abroad, be passionate, hairy-bodied, fond of water and flowers, interested
in construction of houses, wells etc. and will have a prominent neck.
